## Summary

Describe the problem and the focused change that addresses it.

## Verification

- [ ] `git diff --check`
- [ ] SDK-independent configure and build completed
- [ ] CTest passed
- [ ] Hardware tools compiled with an official SDRplay API installation, if available
- [ ] No proprietary SDRplay artifacts, captures, serial numbers, credentials, or personal paths were added

## Hardware testing

If hardware was used, provide the OS, compiler, CMake version, SDRplay API version, genuine RSP1B
model confirmation, exact command, Bias-T status, and redacted results. State "Not run" when no
hardware testing was performed.

- [ ] Bias-T remained off, or the connected equipment was explicitly verified as Bias-T safe
